content: Backend: Add SupportAction model + Alembic-style table for last_support_action persistence
Backend: Create /api/stats/subscriptions endpoint (public, no auth) with DISTINCT wallet counts + weekly XRP + next cycle + last action
Backend: Auto-seed sample support action so UI has data on first load
Frontend: Add statsApi + AnimatedCounter component (count-up + glow on update)
Frontend: TierCard footer wallet count badges (Basic=Users joined, Plus=Active traders, Ultimate=Elite trackers)
Frontend: LiquiditySupportTracker module on Dashboard (weekly XRP + countdown + last action)
Frontend: Trust messaging banner below pricing cards on Landing + Subscribe
